symbols.name: MessageNodeConfig
symbols.description: Configuration for creating a message node

symbols.name: MessageValidator
symbols.signature: type MessageValidator<D> = (msg: Message<D>, read: (uri: string) => Promise<ReadResult<T>>) => Promise<unknown>

symbols.name: MessageData
symbols.description: Standard message data structure for state transitions

symbols.name: MessageValidationContext
symbols.description: Extended validation context for messages using the inputs/outputs convention Provides access to message context during program validation

symbols.name: ProgramSchema
symbols.description: Schema mapping program prefixes to validators

symbols.name: ProgramValidator
symbols.description: Program validator for outputs in messages using the inputs/outputs convention

symbols.name: StateMessage
symbols.description: A message with the inputs/outputs data convention

symbols.name: combineValidators
symbols.description: Combine multiple validators into one (all must pass)

symbols.name: createOutputValidator
symbols.description: Create a message validator that validates outputs against a program schema

symbols.name: extractProgram
symbols.description: Extract the program prefix from a URI
